title: rubus woronowii
intro: Rubus woronowii, also known as the Korean black raspberry or Asian black raspberry, is a species of raspberry that is native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Rubus woronowii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Rubus woronowii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional East Asian medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
